summary: Complete testing of AccessHub Global - Logement partner flows, all dashboard logins, admin logement section, partner landing pages. All 18 backend tests pass. 1 bug found and fixed (logement redirect after login). All core features working.

integration_issues.issue: partenaire_logement role was not redirected to /logement after login in AuthModal.jsx (FIXED)

issues: Admin role (admin/admin_principal) has no auto-redirect to /admin after login - user stays on homepage and must navigate manually. Other roles (agent, partenaire, employeur, partenaire_logement) do auto-redirect. Minor UX improvement needed.

test_results.homepage_loads: PASS - No white screen, no errors
test_results.rejoindre_logement: PASS - Title 'Logez les étudiants du monde entier.' visible
test_results.rejoindre_agent: PASS - Title 'Accompagnez des étudiants. Développez votre activité.' visible
test_results.rejoindre_partenaire: PASS - Title 'Attirez les meilleurs étudiants du monde.' visible
test_results.rejoindre_employeur: PASS - Title 'Recrutez des talents internationaux d'exception.' visible
test_results.logement_register_form: PASS - Form renders with all fields (Prénom, Nom, Email, Téléphone, Nom agence, Doc, Mot de passe, Confirmer)
test_results.logement_dashboard: PASS - Shows stats (Propriétés, Approuvées, En attente, Disponibles) + action buttons
test_results.logement_stats_api: PASS - GET /api/logement/stats returns {total, approved, pending, available}
test_results.admin_login_to_admin: PASS - Admin can access /admin (no auto-redirect but direct nav works)
test_results.admin_logement_sidebar: PASS - 'Partenaires logement' item visible in Gestion group
test_results.admin_logement_section: PASS - Shows LogementPartnersSection with 1 partner (Test Logement) and 0 properties tabs
test_results.admin_logement_partners_api: PASS - GET /api/admin/logement-partners returns list with test_logement@test.com
test_results.employer_login_redirect: PASS - Redirects to /employer with stats (1 offre totale, 1 active, 0 en attente, 1 candidature)
test_results.companies_section_homepage: PASS - 'Nos entreprises partenaires' section visible with AccessHub Global + JobCorp

action_items: MINOR: Add admin/admin_principal redirect to /admin in AuthModal.jsx login handler (lines 62-65 and 97-100) - same pattern as other roles
critical_code_review_comments: AuthModal.jsx redirect logic for admin role was missing (partenaire_logement was also missing - FIXED). Admin redirect to /admin should be added for consistent UX.
AuthModal.jsx lines 62-65: all role redirects are now: agent->/agent, partenaire->/partner, employeur->/employer, partenaire_logement->/logement. Missing: admin/admin_principal->/admin

success_rate.frontend: 95% (1 minor UX issue: admin no auto-redirect)

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test property during backend tests. Created and deleted test registration user (test_register_check@tmp.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows tested and working. 1 bug fixed: partenaire_logement redirect in AuthModal.jsx. 1 minor action item: admin role should also redirect to /admin after login (same pattern as agent/partenaire/employeur/partenaire_logement). Backend: logement.py router fully functional (register, stats, properties CRUD, admin management). Admin section 'logement-partners' is working in AdminCMS. All 4 /rejoindre/:type landing pages work. Dashboard for all roles work.

logement_redirect_missing.issue: partenaire_logement role redirect to /logement missing in AuthModal.jsx
logement_redirect_missing.root_cause: When adding logement feature, the redirect case was not added to the login success handler in AuthModal.jsx alongside the existing agent/partenaire/employeur cases
logement_redirect_missing.fix_applied: Added `else if (result.user?.role === 'partenaire_logement') navigate('/logement');` in both login success handlers (lines 62-65 and 97-100)
